evals.description: Triggers on request to create a 30/60/90 plan
evals.prompt: I just hired a senior software engineer. Help me create a 30/60/90 day onboarding plan for them.

evals.description: Triggers on buddy program setup request
evals.prompt: We want to set up a buddy program for new hires. How should we structure it?

evals.description: Triggers on first week schedule request
evals.prompt: My new product manager starts Monday. Can you help me plan their first week day by day?
How do I measure whether our onboarding program is actually working?

evals.description: Triggers on knowledge transfer plan request
evals.prompt: A key engineer is leaving in 4 weeks. How do I build a knowledge transfer plan?

evals.description: Produces a 30/60/90 plan with three distinct phases
evals.prompt: Write a 30/60/90 day plan for a new sales development representative joining a B2B SaaS startup.
Should I assign a mentor or a buddy to my new hire? What is the difference?

evals.description: Recommends feedback surveys at the right cadence
evals.prompt: When and how should I collect feedback from new hires about the onboarding experience?
Our onboarding is pretty minimal - we just give new hires a laptop and tell them to figure it out. Is that a problem?

evals.description: Recommends role-specific onboarding tracks in addition to general onboarding
evals.prompt: We have a generic onboarding for everyone. Should we have different tracks for different roles?

evals.description: Does not trigger for general performance management
evals.prompt: How do I put an underperforming employee on a performance improvement plan?

evals.description: Provides time-to-productivity as the core ramp metric
evals.prompt: What is the single most important metric to track for a new hire's ramp?
